accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description:
*accountIdInstructions
The Account Id of the doctor (Person Account). Use the doctorId resolved in topic Instruction 2 — never invent or guess this Id.

description.title: description
description.description: Optional longer context about the task — relevant background from the visit, items to bring, points to discuss. Leave blank if the user did not provide additional detail.

dueDate.title: dueDate
dueDate.description: The task due date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Parse natural language like "tomorrow", "next Friday", "in 3 days", "Monday" relative to today. Leave blank if the user did not specify a date — the Flow defaults to 10 days from today.

subject.title: subject
subject.description: A short, action-oriented subject line for the task, extracted from the user's request. Examples: "Send oncology brochure", "Schedule lunch meeting", "Follow up on referral discussion".
